mapper.sql: id, approval_id, stage, decider_user_id, decider_username, decision, decided_at, remark, created_at
mapper.select: select from t_r_approval_decision where approval_id = #{approvalId} order by decided_at asc, id asc
select from t_r_approval_decision where decider_user_id = #{deciderUserId} order by decided_at desc, id desc
